message.content: This section, titled "画面与音效表现" (Visual and Audio Performance), functions exclusively as a structural heading. It indicates that the document addresses the visual and audio quality or presentation of a subject, but the provided excerpt contains no substantive content. As such, it can only answer high-level navigational or structural questions regarding where visual and audio performance is discussed.
